name: Schisandra Schisandra chinensis
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Product-specific extract dosing varies; direct human clinical dose support is limited

dosage: Standardized extract (e.g., 1-3% schisandrins): 500-1500 mg/day; variability across products
typical_dosage: Standardized extract (e.g., 1-3% schisandrins): 500-1500 mg/day; variability across products
